error_signature: The service was not able to process your request
context_key: AI Agent node with HTTP Request tool
title: Generic error message from AI Agent on HTTP request failure
symptom: When a tool within the AI Agent fails, it returns a generic error message instead of detailed error information. This makes it difficult to understand the cause of the failure.
not_this_if: Detailed error messages are already being captured
Using a different node for HTTP requests
root_cause: The AI Agent node does not provide detailed error messages by default when an HTTP request fails. Instead, it returns a generic error message, which can hinder debugging and error handling.
fix_steps: Open the settings of the HTTP Request tool within the AI Agent node.
Enable the 'Include Response Headers and Status' option.
Save the workflow and test the execution again.
agent_instruction: Enable 'Include Response Headers and Status' and 'Never Error' options in the HTTP Request tool settings.
